{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks about the cause of cardiac dysarrythmia during extraction. However, Document [29] (Title: Facial Burns -- Treatment / Management) discusses how electricity to the heart can cause cardiac necrosis and conduction abnormalities, and ventricular fibrillation is the most serious dysrhythmia.
